name: golang-github-gogo-protobuf-dev
title: golang-github-gogo-protobuf-dev
summary: alternative protocol buffer support for Golang - sources
description:
alternative protocol buffer support for Golang - sources
An alternative protocol buffer support for the Go programming language,
forked from golang-goprotobuf. It is backwards compatible with
goprotobuf, but provides faster marshalling and unmarshalling and can
generate extra helper code, tests and benchmarks.
.
This package provides sources.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-gogo-protobuf-dev because alternative protocol buffer support for Golang - sources.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-gogo-protobuf-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-gogo-protobuf-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-gogo-protobuf-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
